processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'SalesEmployee', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @irregularChars varchar(128), @field varchar(32), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end create index i on @@table (ma_nvbh) -- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join dmnvbh b on a.ma_nvbh = b.ma_nvbh select @field = 'ma_nvbh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nvbh like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; -- Checking &Checking; -- Gather select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmnvbh b on a.ma_nvbh = b.ma_nvbh delete @@table from @@table a join #k b on a.ma_nvbh = b.ma_nvbh -- Checking select @field = 'ma_nvbh' select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_nvbh <> b.ma_nvbh and a.ma_nvbh like rtrim(b.ma_nvbh) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, dmnvbh b with (index(PK_dmnvbh)) where a.ma_nvbh like rtrim(b.ma_nvbh) + '%'&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmnvbh a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_nvbh like rtrim(b.ma_nvbh) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
